novel_features.name: History-depth probe
novel_features.description: Discover how far back your Costco receipts actually go, past the website's 2-year UI cap.
novel_features.rationale: The website date picker caps at 2 years, but the API accepts an arbitrary startDate; only stepping the range backward reveals the true server-side floor for your account.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to answer 'can I get receipts older than two years' — it probes the live API boundary instead of trusting the UI.

novel_features.name: Spend analytics
novel_features.description: Roll up your spend by month, warehouse, or department over a date range.
novel_features.rationale: Aggregates across many receipts and line items in one pass; no single Costco API call returns a rollup.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent needs spend totals or trends the website never computes.

novel_features.name: Item price history
novel_features.description: Track one item's unit price across every receipt over time.
novel_features.rationale: Correlates the same item across many receipts over time — something no single API response gives you.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Pick this to see whether a recurring buy has crept up in price.

novel_features.name: Instant savings captured
novel_features.description: Total the instant savings and coupons you captured over a date range.
novel_features.rationale: Sums instantSavings and coupon amounts across receipts; the UI never totals this.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to quantify how much Costco deals actually saved you.

novel_features.name: Return-window watch
novel_features.description: Flag recently purchased items still inside a return window you set.
novel_features.rationale: Derived from local receipt dates; no API or UI surface lists items by return-eligibility.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to find what you can still return before a deadline.

narrative.headline: Your complete Costco receipt history as data — past the website's 2-year wall, in a local database the site never gives you.
narrative.value_prop: Costco's site shows receipts in 6-month chunks up to 2 years, but the backend serves more. This CLI pulls in-warehouse, gas, and online purchase history over any date range, probes how far back your account actually goes with history-depth, computes spend and item-price-history analytics on the fly, and builds a local SQLite archive (sync) for offline SQL and search.
narrative.auth_narrative: Costco's receipts API uses a short-lived bearer token (idToken) that your browser stores in localStorage after login. Capture it once from DevTools (localStorage.idToken and localStorage.clientID) and set it with auth set-token; the token expires in minutes, so doctor decodes its expiry and tells you when to refresh. No cookies or password are stored.

quickstart.comment: Check token presence and JWT expiry before anything else
Find how far back the API actually serves your receipts
Pull in-warehouse receipts for a date range
Build the local SQLite archive for offline search and analytics
Roll up spend the website never computes

troubleshoots.fix: Token expired (idToken lives ~15 min). Re-copy localStorage.idToken from DevTools and run 'auth set-token'.

troubleshoots.symptom: Empty receipts for a known period
troubleshoots.fix: Confirm the date range with --since/--until; the API returns the full account history, so widen the range with history-depth.
Refresh the idToken from a logged-in costco.com tab and re-run auth set-token.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when an agent or user needs Costco purchase history as structured data: pulling receipts past the 2-year UI cap, archiving line items locally, computing spend or savings totals, or tracking an item's price over time. It is read-only and member-scoped.
anti_triggers: Do not use this CLI to place or modify Costco orders — it is read-only.
Do not use it to browse the public product catalog or check prices for items you have not purchased.
Do not use it for membership signup, returns processing, or any account mutation.

recipes.title: Find your true history floor
recipes.explanation: Steps startDate backward and reports the earliest receipt the API will serve for your account.

recipes.title: Export receipts to a spreadsheet
recipes.explanation: Flat line-item CSV ready for budgeting tools.

recipes.title: Narrow a verbose receipt payload for an agent
recipes.explanation: Receipts list output is a flat array; --select trims each row to just the fields an agent needs.

recipes.title: See spend by warehouse
recipes.explanation: Aggregates local receipts into per-warehouse spend totals.

recipes.title: What can I still return?
recipes.explanation: Lists recently bought items still inside a 90-day window from their receipt date.

trigger_phrases: how far back do my costco receipts go
